title: BriefForgeOutput
description: Workflow output for brief-forge. `converged` carries a brief the workflow stamped `refutation_survived` on (never the designer); `contested` carries the LAST brief and LAST refutation after refute_cap rounds — cap exhaustion is a finding, not a failure. The embedded objects are shaped by the sibling brief.schema.json and refutation.schema.json (kept loose here so this file stays self-contained for the packager).

outcome.description: converged = the design survived refutation; contested = refute_cap exhausted, the operator gets both sides.

brief.description: The brief object verbatim, shaped by schemas/brief.schema.json. On `converged` it carries `refutation_survived`; on `contested` it is the last draft, unstamped.

refutation.description: The surviving (or last) refutation, shaped by schemas/refutation.schema.json.

diagnose_only.description: Passed through from the input: dispatch of the brief is deliberately deferred.
